title: Pulling data element from one board to another using AI tool

posts.author: adnan.selimanovic (Adnan Selimanovic)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi there,
it would be amazing if Monday could use their AI tool to look up data elements from one board and bring it into column of another board.
For example, email, i have a Deals board and i would like to send an email using automation, when a stage changes, to a group or to one contact, from Contact board.
Currently automation of this sort of task, can only read TEXT column, so that means that we have to manually add email to email column.
Please consider!
Adnan
